arts.ttl: What Mikel Arteta and Arne Slot have said about Premier League title race - 'such a great position' - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal are battling Liverpool to be crowned Premier League champions this season, but face an uphill task with nine matches left to play. The Reds lost the Carabao Cup final and were knocked out of the Champions League by Paris Saint-Germain before the international break, but insists the Merseyside club are looking forward to the run-in.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Arsenal star Gabriel forced off injured just one week before Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: The Gunners defender limped off in the 16th minute of the match against Fulham on Tuesday evening seven days before his side take on Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Why isn't Arsenal vs Fulham on TV? Gunners fans fume at 'ridiculous' decision as Man Utd preferred
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League clash with Fulham wasn't chosen by TNT Sports, leaving Gunners supporters furious as Manchester United against Nottingham Forest was preferred

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed major transfer update after 'meeting' as reality becomes clearer
arts.sum: Jorginho’s departure from Arsenal is looking increasingly likely after a reported meeting with Flamengo took place over the weekend. With the season concluding at the end of May, the report states there is a possibility that Jorginho could arrive at Flamengo before the Premier League season ends.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Fulham: Mikel Arteta makes Bukayo Saka starting XI decision
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka was named in his first Premier League matchday squad since Christmas against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Bukayo Saka decision vs Fulham as Arsenal starting XI confirmed
arts.sum: Saka needs minutes like tonight with just a week to go until Los Blancos come to town and having the Gunners’ best available starting XI will be a massive boost for the side. And the fact that he's able to come in the most important part of the season obviously is a massive boost for him and to the team as well.”

arts.ttl: Saka returns to Arsenal squad for Fulham clash
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is back in the Arsenal squad for Tuesday's game against Fulham, ending a three-month spell on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to sell Gabriel Jesus to fund summer transfer overhaul
arts.sum: “Centre-forward, you’ve got Havertz at the minute and Gabriel Jesus. The Gunners need to sell to be able to afford a top-quality centre-forward and Bent believes Jesus is the most obvious option to offload.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Bukayo Saka decision for Arsenal's clash with Fulham
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has been out since December with a hamstring injury but has now returned to the Arsenal squad for the final two months of the season

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Fulham - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Bukayo Saka returns to Gunners squad as they look to keep alive slim title hopes, with top flight football returning after international break
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Arsenal host Fulham at the Emirates, whole West Ham travel to Molineux to face Wolves in the Premier League.
